description: Formal v1.1 Pattern Unit channel contract. Channels are unit-local prototype-affinity indices used by selector feature scoring. Individual indices do not carry named concepts, and H/W remain non-semantic storage coordinates.

explore.rationale: The schema identifies the explore Unit's deterministic prototype-affinity set. It does not assign novelty, hypothesis, or any other concept to an individual channel index.

build.rationale: The schema identifies the build Unit's deterministic prototype-affinity set. Individual channels are not implementation stages or planning concepts.

verify.rationale: The schema identifies the verify Unit's deterministic prototype-affinity set. Evidence, risk, and uncertainty are Unit-level intent labels, not per-channel meanings.

summarize.rationale: The schema identifies the summarize Unit's deterministic prototype-affinity set. No channel is fixed as a salience or compression dimension.

clarify.rationale: The schema identifies the clarify Unit's deterministic prototype-affinity set. Ambiguity and missing information are not assigned to individual indices.

respond.rationale: The schema identifies the respond Unit's deterministic prototype-affinity set. Style and response properties remain Unit-level labels without per-index semantics.
